0.label: Anonymous
0.data: VaultPitch: Verifiable AI for Secure Data Rooms. Mission: Make confidential pitch sharing secure, verifiable, and legally enforceable using TEE hardware. Team: 4-person team with cryptography and legal expertise. Market: $5B+ secure data room market.

1.label: Verified Judge
1.data: Traction: 47 pilot teams, 3 hackathons, $8,200 MRR in beta. 3 VC firms in talks. Roadmap: Q2 public launch, Q3 enterprise tier, Q4 on-chain NDA marketplace. Competitive advantages: First mover in TEE-enforced NDAs, IC3 research partnership.

2.label: Lead Partner
2.data: Architecture: Intel TDX + Dstack confidential containers + Llama-3 with NDAI middleware. Stack: Rust (TEE core), Python (NDAI guardrail), React (frontend), Solidity (NDA contracts). Financials: $180k runway, seeking $500k seed, 18-month path to $50k MRR. IP: 2 provisional patents on NDAI enforcement mechanisms.
